title: Ben Deniston on what is Mankind?  Dec 7th, 2014
description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Ben Deniston from 21st Century Science and Technology Magazine, on the critical question, what is Mankind? And what is the difference between man and animal?  And how this relates to the need for the United States to collaborate with Russia, China, and India on scientific defense of humanity.
